so it's not like we can't do it, but that was my mindset coming into it.

It converts to a sign up, engage, pay goal in December and on, but maybe this is something you and I can take offline and talk about.
Yeah, maybe.

It sounds like what, just reflect, it sounds like what you're saying is, hey, is there, like, we're looking for some sense that the content is intrinsically valuable to folks, such that, like, because of the seasonality, like, there's an indication that there will be other value later on.
Exactly, yeah, that would be the idea where we know that it's, like, the kind of click traffic that will result in.

And, you know, like, there are things, like, one thing we maybe could do is make the CTAs in the blog posts more prominent and make them be more, like, scheduled time with someone on the tax team, for example, where it's not, like, a sign up for the product, but something like that.

And even if that CTA doesn't actually schedule time, it goes to a sign-up page, but maybe we could be iterating more on the CTAs to get learnings there, making the CTAs more prominent than just in text.
I think there's probably things like that that we could do that would also be helpful to us that would allow us, like, you know, click here to schedule a free consultation.
And then they get to a page that's like, hey, we're all out of free consultations right now, like we're sold out.
But at least if they're taking care of the free consultation, you know you've hooked people that are thinking about tax things.
know that you have content that has tickled their interest where they think they're leaving money on the ground because they're not taking care of some deductions.
So there's probably stuff like that that is worth working into what we're trying to learn between now and December.
And then in December, when I think it does become a time or period where people are actually thinking about tax prep, then, you know, we can then start testing.
The, like, schedule your onboarding call or, like, see how we could do your taxes, kind of, kind of CTAs or people going through onboarding.
And I think this is, yeah, go ahead, Kyle.
Just throwing out there one thing I've experimented with at different stops related to this is I'm a big fan of actually presenting options in the right way.

And so I've been at different stops that have a pure sales lead and a PLG motion and, you know, or trial, if you will, and, you know, how to have those side by side and done a lot of testing around them and doing either or, presenting both, and generally found the both option tend to work quite well and just making one more prominent depending on, like, what is the one that's going to be most effective.
That's typically what people will select, but people tend to respond fairly well to options when presented in the right way.
I don't know if that will really work here or not, but just saying it doesn't have to be an either or based off some of things I've seen in the past.
Yeah, and I think this is aligned with Ehtisham, what you presented last week around middle and bottom of funnel.
It's just like framed in a different way.
So knowing that this is kind of the second week that we're talking about it, like maybe that's the, that's something we could take forward for next week if you're open to it.

It's like, hey, what are the two or three options, like the handful of options we could explore here to like see whether we could get the impression to click ratio, like outside of this concept of like a revenue forecast, which we're still iterating on, how do we kind of experiment with what could be effective there?
Is that something that you would be open to?
I know this kind of like, this is not necessarily like the long form editorial delivery, but, but it's related.
Yeah, definitely happy to share insights, ideas, things of that nature.
You know, success of those type of elements is success in the content and traffic.
We developed for you, and so, you know, we certainly want to ensure, you know, we can do what we can to help, you know, guide you along that journey of having the right foundation here.
So, yeah, that sounds good, and, you know, I hear you both loud and clear on terms of the traffic, you know, seeing more momentum there from a non-brand perspective.
And so, you know, we can make sure we are being more mindful of that, how we've got into our updates, and just, you know, walking through our journey of how we're trying to address that.
Okay.
Sure.
Cool.
Anything else?
No, I just have a bunch of action items to take care of.
Sorry, not sorry, Ehtisham.
Okay, cool.
And then we'll definitely follow up with Tony as he's back, you know, early next week, but really.

Okay.
Thank you so much for the time.
Appreciate it.
Good to see you all.
Thank you.
Same as well.
a nice day, Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO progress, and next steps for the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [5 articles ready for publication; production back on track after brief slowdown](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Organic traffic holding steady; need to improve non-branded search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Implementing author bios, clickable table of contents to boost engagement](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Experimenting with mix of low and high-volume keywords in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Need to establish clearer traffic/conversion goals aligned with business objectives](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [5 articles ready to be published](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [3 articles on hold due to statistics issues in non-tax content](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Production slowed in last 4 days but now back on track](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Mixing low and high-volume/difficulty keywords in new topics](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

### Traffic and SEO Performance

  - [Impressions growing, good clicks last week](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Organic traffic steady: 89 views, 25 active users, 3.56 views/user](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Most traffic from branded keywords (e.g., "town tax startup")](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Non-branded keywords showing up but with low clicks (4-5)](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Author Bios and Website Updates

  - [Author bios ready to implement](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Discussion on ideal implementation:](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [Dropdown in CMS to select author](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [Short bio and image at end of article](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [Data stored in background, populated when attributed](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Tony (CMS owner) needed for implementation; currently out of office](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### Content Strategy and Experimentation

  - [Mixing low-volume/difficulty with some high-volume/difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Need to monitor performance differences between approaches](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Aiming to eventually win on higher-volume searches](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Considering stronger CTAs in blog posts (e.g., "Schedule free consultation")](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Re-invited GrowthX to PostHog for analytics access](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [App.town.com analytics not well-instrumented; needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Traffic Goals and Business Alignment

  - [No specific traffic goals set yet](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Discussion on aligning content strategy with revenue goals](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Challenge: Tax prep seasonality (mainly January onwards)](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Short-term focus on clicks/impressions; long-term on signups/engagement/payments](https://fathom.video/share/PUdcXVWZHWJqJws_fDYrKGotXMxcT72b?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
